name: TECHNO ASSOCIE Co., Ltd.
summary: TECHNO ASSOCIE Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, and sells fasteners, processed components, metal materials, raw steel, electrical components, chemical products, and industrial machineries worldwide. It offers structural parts for smartphones, tablets, digital cameras, and car navigation systems, as well as wearables; automotive metal and molded products, such as engines, transmissions, electrical components, anti-vibration, brakes, seats, and interior products; and solutions for air conditioners, refrigerators, copiers, robotics, and smart meters. The company also provides housing and construction products, such as solar power generation systems and other products for energy-creating equipment and installation materials; double-sided tape adhesive, tie bolts, and other house construction work-saving products; decorative products for housing equipment and home renovation; and exterior materials. In addition, it offers fastener products, including JIS standard screws, tapping screws for resin, tapping screws for light alloys, high-strength screws, lightweight screws, special surface treatment, anti-loosening screws and nuts, tapping screws for thin gage metal, anti-cam out screws, micro screws, anti-corrosion screws, functional rivets, and imported products. Further, the company provides industrial tapes, industrial adhesives, rubber parts, styrofoams, non-woven fabrics, highly functional films, PTFE porous films, filters, heat-damage-prevention products, noise-damage-prevention products, electromagnetic-prevention products, water-proof/water-stop products, and flame-resistant and non-combustible materials. Additionally, it offers machine tools and factory automation products; parts for medical equipment; fastener parts and decorative materials for trains; and caterpillar forgings for construction machinery. The company was founded in 1804 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan. TECHNO ASSOCIE Co., Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of Sumitomo Electric Industries, Ltd.
